content: TASK-059 increased ordinary wheel and trackpad camera movement to 1.35x across 2D, Prototype, and 3D while leaving pinch/ctrl-wheel zoom unchanged. Browser verification measured an 80px input as 108px camera movement with stable scale; typecheck, 237 tests, and build pass. TASK-058 endpoint-border clearance also remains verified. Release v0.2.0 is complete on GitHub; npm publication still requires a human npm account with @archmap/core ownership, followed by npm/jsDelivr verification.
